'''nadama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldfag|oldfag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldfag|oldfag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nadama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædæmæth|nædæmæth]] || [[word:nædæmæj|nædæmæj]] || [[word:nædæmæsh|nædæmæsh]] || [[word:nædæmæ|nædæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadadamath|nadadamath]] || [[word:nadadamaj|nadadamaj]] || [[word:nadadamash|nadadamash]] || [[word:nadadama|nadadama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadamath|nadamath]] || [[word:nadamaj|nadamaj]] || [[word:nadamash|nadamash]] || [[word:nadama|nadama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadafmath|nadafmath]] || [[word:nadafmaj|nadafmaj]] || [[word:nadafmash|nadafmash]] || [[word:nadafmaf|nadafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadamatha|nadamatha]] || [[word:nadamaja|nadamaja]] || [[word:nadamasha|nadamasha]] || [[word:nadamaka|nadamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadamath|nadamath]] || [[word:nadamaj|nadamaj]] || [[word:nadamash|nadamash]] || [[word:nadama|nadama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadamathal|nadamathal]] || [[word:nadamajal|nadamajal]] || [[word:nadamashal|nadamashal]] || [[word:nadamakal|nadamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadamathatha|nadamathatha]] || [[word:nadamajaja|nadamajaja]] || [[word:nadamashasha|nadamashasha]] || [[word:nadamaka|nadamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadamathan|nadamathan]] || [[word:nadamajan|nadamajan]] || [[word:nadamashan|nadamashan]] || [[word:nadamakan|nadamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadamathaoro|nadamathaoro]] || [[word:nadamajaoro|nadamajaoro]] || [[word:nadamashaoro|nadamashaoro]] || [[word:nadamakaoro|nadamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
